items.title: 4-Theme Accessibility System
items.body: Implement 4-theme selector in both layouts. Cayman/Midnight existing. Daltonism-accessible light/dark with blue+orange CVD-safe pairing. Awaiting: commit, push, deploy, visual QA.

items.title: Seamless Evolution Relay — Documentation
items.body: Document v39 evolution relay capability in all relevant publications. Story #5 captured in source. Web pages need sync.

items.title: Export Documentation
items.body: PDF and DOCX export implemented in both layouts (client-side JS) but not yet documented as a publication section.

items.title: Conformity Report Review — #9a Elevation Token
items.body:
Compliance review completed. v46 changes resolved most concerns. Score: 16/23 Applied, 2 By design, 4 Planned, 1 Future.

⏱ Time to deliver: ~3h active investigation / 23 calendar days (v27→v46, 19 versions). See Success Story #8.

items.title: Publication/Doc Version Numbers
items.body: Pages do not output latest version number. Version banner shows publication version, not knowledge version.

items.title: Python String Memory Not Zero-Overwritten
items.full_title: FIX: Python String Memory Not Zero-Overwritten
items.body: Python GC does not zero-overwrite string memory. Token may persist in freed memory. Plan: bytearray instead of str.

items.title: Git Clone Token URL Exposure
items.full_title: FIX: Git Clone Token URL Exposure
items.body: git clone with token in URL is visible in /proc/<pid>/cmdline. Should prefer header-based auth. Partial compliance.

items.title: CLAUDE.md Size at Download
items.body: CLAUDE.md at 3000+ lines. WebFetch may truncate. Need to verify all access methods deliver complete file.

items.title: Webcard Coverage Gaps
items.body:
All webcards generated including #12. Total: 68 GIFs (17 cards x 2 themes x 2 langs).

⏱ Time to deliver: Part of Concordance Marathon (~4h session). 24 GIFs generated in PR #150. See Success Story #3.

items.title: Publication Freshness Review
items.body: Publications #1-#8 need doc review against current knowledge version. Last full review: never done systematically.

items.title: Satellite Bootstrap Road Test
items.body: Iterative staging protocol (v25) needs road test on a fresh satellite to validate full cycle.

items.title: Knowledge-Live PQC Hardware Security
items.body: Post-quantum crypto with hardware-backed key storage using STM32 secure element. Upgrade from software-only PQC Envelope.

items.title: Beacon Network Encrypted Communications
items.body: PQC-secured beacon-to-beacon communication using pqc_envelope.py. Auto-detection ladder implemented. Awaiting protocol integration.

items.title: Hardware-Backed Token Storage
items.body: STM32 secure element for ephemeral token protection. Token encrypted in RAM with hardware-held key.

items.title: Multi-Satellite Real-Time Sync
items.body: Evolve from async git-mediated harvest to real-time inter-instance communication via beacon network.

items.title: bytearray + mlock Token Hardening
items.body: Store in bytearray (mutable, zeroing), mlock() on secret memory, prctl(PR_SET_DUMPABLE, 0).

items.title: Resiliency Documentation & Implementation
items.body: Document and formalize resiliency architecture: checkpoint/resume, safe elevation, recall, recovery ladder. Candidate for publication.

items.title: Complete Publication Full Pages
items.body: Publications #0-#4 have source + summary only. Scaffold and populate complete web pages (/full/).

items.title: Stranded Branch Intelligence
items.body: Deep recall search across all claude/* branches for committed work never merged.

items.title: Session Note Mining
items.body: Review notes/ session files across all branches for undocumented insights and patterns.

items.title: Cross-Session Pattern Detection
items.body: Analyze commit history and PR descriptions for recurring patterns to formalize.

items.title: Unfinished Protocol Discoveries
items.body: Recover partially-documented proxy behavior, API boundary mappings from interrupted sessions.

items.title: Follow up Knowledge Compliancy Report (P9)
items.full_title: TASK: Follow up Knowledge Compliancy Report (P9)
items.body:
Track and advance the compliance checkpoints in the Knowledge Compliancy Report (P9, Board #43).

Scope:
- Monitor compliance status across 5 lifecycle phases (Reception, In-Memory, Usage, Disposal, Post-Session)
- Advance planned items through the compliance lifecycle
- Update the compliance report publication (#9a) as checkpoints are addressed
- Coordinate with Security by Design (#9) for new security improvements

Board: https://github.com/users/packetqc/projects/43
Publication: docs/publicat

items.title: Investors, Sponsors and/or Job
items.body: Request that allows me to use Knowledge on the project to deliver with incomes: STM32, TouchGFX, any technical coding or infrastructure, and non-technical work that requires Knowledge efficiency. Employment or contracts is needed to assist Public Government and Private sectors distributed locally in the province, in the country and/or in the world.

items.title: Investisseurs, Commanditaires et/ou Emploi
items.body: Demande permettant d'utiliser Knowledge avec revenus pour livrer : STM32, TouchGFX, tout codage technique ou infrastructure, et travail non technique nécessitant l'efficacité de Knowledge. Un emploi ou des contrats sont nécessaires permettant d'assister les secteurs public gouvernemental et privé distribués localement dans la province, dans le pays et/ou dans le monde.

items.title: Widget for project boards
items.body:
Live board widgets on plan pages with per-section filtering, dropdown status filters, Mermaid lifecycle diagram, Completed/Terminé section, and board sync pipeline (sync_roadmap.py). Replaces Jira board views + Confluence roadmaps.

⏱ Time to deliver: ~3h session. 1 Python script + 2 layout updates + 6 plan pages + 1 board synced + full documentation. See Success Story #12.

items.title: Story's layout convention
items.body:
## Summary

Improve the Success Stories summary pages with a consistent layout convention that includes:

1. **Time delivery paragraph** — Add session time / delivery breakdown text to each story on the summary page (currently only on full/complete pages)
2. **Mermaid pie chart** — Add a pie chart per story showing execution vs calendar time proportions, theme-aware colors with transparent background
3. **Reusable in full pages** — The pie chart convention applies to both summary and full pages

items.title: g:<board>:<item>[:<action>] — GitHub board item alias convention
items.full_title: HARVEST: g:<board>:<item>[:<action>] — GitHub board item alias convention
items.body:
## Summary

New alias convention discovered in knowledge-live (P3) session 2026-02-25.

## Convention

Extends the `#N:` project alias to GitHub board items:

```
g:<board>:<item>           — reference a GitHub board item
g:<board>:<item>:done      — mark item as done (compilation action)
```

| Part | Meaning | Example |
|------|---------|---------|
| `g` | GitHub board scope | — |
| `<board>` | GitHub Project board number | `10` = Export Documentation |
| `<item>` | Item index (1-based, creati

items.title: Satellite tooling parity — knowledge-live replicates core publication.html
items.full_title: TASK: Satellite tooling parity — knowledge-live replicates core publication.html
items.body:
Context: When Claude wakes up in a satellite repo (e.g. knowledge-live), it should have the same project management and documentation tooling as the core (packetqc/knowledge). Currently knowledge-live publication.html diverges from the core in several areas.

Delta to resolve:
- Theme selector: core has 4-theme system (auto/cayman/midnight/daltonism) — knowledge-live missing
- DOCX export: core has functional HTML blob download — knowledge-live is a stub (alert)
- PDF engine: core uses html2pdf.

items.title: Sync publication.html baseline — knowledge-live from core (pre-prod replica)
items.full_title: TASK: Sync publication.html baseline — knowledge-live from core (pre-prod replica)
items.body:
Architecture: knowledge-live is a pre-production satellite. Its publication.html must start from the same baseline as the core (packetqc/knowledge) before any evolution is added on top.

Currently missing in knowledge-live vs core:
- Theme selector (4-theme: auto/cayman/midnight/daltonism) — full UI widget with localStorage
- DOCX export — HTML blob download, functional in core
- Mermaid rendering — 4-theme-aware initialization
- Cross-references keyword widget — dynamic section at page bottom
-

items.title: Harvest print/PDF evolutions from knowledge-live to core
items.full_title: TASK: Harvest print/PDF evolutions from knowledge-live to core
items.body:
Architecture: knowledge-live (pre-production) is where new features are validated before promotion to the core (production). The following publication.html evolutions were developed and validated in knowledge-live and are ready for harvest to core.

Evolutions to harvest:
- Cover page (@media print) — dedicated print cover with title, description, pub_id, version, generated timestamp
- @page CSS running headers/footers — header left: pub_id + title, header right: section title (string-set), foot

- `bug`, `documentation`, `duplicate`, `enhancement`, `good first issue`, `help wanted`, `invalid`, `question`, `wontfix`

**Created by knowledge sessions** (13):
- `SESSION` — session tracking issues
- `METHODOLOGY:` — methodology-related
- `PUB:` — publication-related
- `analysis` — analysi

items.title: Session Runtime Cache — Persistent Session Metadata Across Compaction/Restart
items.full_title: FEATURE: Session Runtime Cache — Persistent Session Metadata Across Compaction/Restart
items.body:
## Feature: Session Runtime Cache

### Parent
P0 — Knowledge System (#4 board)
Related: #479 (Agent Ticket Sync)

### Problem
After compaction or container restart, the session's tracking issue number is lost. The agent cannot auto-reconnect because the issue # only lived in context memory and the volatile /tmp/ state file.

### Solution
`notes/session-runtime.json` — a persistent cache file that stores:
- Session issue number
- Repository (owner/repo)
- Branch name
- Agent mode (normal/live/bur
